design_philosophy: A high-end, award-winning portfolio blending Apple's refined glassmorphism with Web3-style glowing 3D aesthetics. It positions the Data Analyst as a premium tech professional through immersive WebGL data visualizations, deep contrast, and precision micro-interactions.

mono.usage: Use for tech stack pills, data metrics, and small labels.

surface_styles.glass_card: bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] rounded-2xl
surface_styles.glow_border: relative overflow-hidden before:absolute before:-inset-[1px] before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-[#00F0FF] before:via-[#7B2CBF] before:to-[#007AFF] before:rounded-2xl before:opacity-0 hover:before:opacity-100 before:transition-opacity before:duration-500 after:absolute after:inset-[1px] after:bg-[#0A0B10] after:rounded-[15px] after:z-[-1]
surface_styles.neo_brutal_tech: bg-[#0A0B10] border border-[#00F0FF]/30 hover:border-[#00F0FF] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.3)] transition-all rounded-lg

animations.scroll: Use Lenis for premium smooth momentum scrolling.
animations.page_transitions: Framer Motion AnimatePresence with a subtle fade and 10px Y-axis lift.
animations.hover_effects: Cards tilt slightly using Framer Motion's useMotionTemplate. Buttons have an inner glow sweep.
animations.background_3d: React Three Fiber canvas with floating Points/Particles representing a neural network or data cluster.

layout_and_spacing.grid: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) for Projects and Skills.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous spacing: sections should have py-24 or py-32. Containers max-w-7xl px-6 md:px-12.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned text for readability, asymmetrical layouts to create tension.

hero_avatar.description: Smiling cartoon/anime boy in purple hoodie, perfect for the modern stylized avatar requested.

project_powerbi.description: Dark mode modern performance dashboard on a screen

project_ml.description: Purple and pink tech abstract lights

hero.layout: Min-h-screen relative flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden.
hero.background: Absolute inset-0 z-0. React Three Fiber <Canvas> rendering a constellation of glowing data nodes (Points) that slowly rotate and slightly repel from the mouse cursor.
hero.content: Z-10 relative max-w-7xl w-full grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center.
hero.headline: Aravind Reddy M
hero.typing_effect: Framer Motion powered typing text looping through: 'Data Analyst', 'SQL & Python Expert', 'Power BI Specialist', 'Machine Learning Explorer'. Text color: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-400 to-purple-500.
hero.description: Transforming raw data into meaningful insights through analytics, visualization, and predictive modeling.
hero.ctas: Two buttons: Primary (View Projects - solid white text, glow border), Secondary (Contact Me - glassmorphism). Include Social icons (GitHub, LinkedIn).
hero.avatar_display: Use the hero_avatar image inside a glassmorphism circular or rounded-2xl frame. Add a floating animation using Framer Motion (y: [-10, 10, -10]). Add a subtle drop-shadow with cyan/purple glow.

about.title: Who Am I?
about.design: Asymmetrical layout. Large typographic quotes on the left, detailed body text on the right. Text reveals on scroll (opacity & y-transform).

features: Animated Pill Grid: Display tech stack (SQL, Python, Power BI, Machine Learning, Statistics, Excel, Tableau) as glassmorphism pills.
Interactive 3D Element: A rotating Sphere in R3F mapped with tech logos or just a wireframe globe acting as a background element behind the skills grid.

experience_journey.design: Since there's no professional experience, design a 'Learning & Growth Journey' timeline. Vertical line with glowing cyan dots. Each entry is a glass card describing a milestone (e.g., 'Mastered SQL & Window Functions', 'Built First ML Model').

projects.design: Grid columns: 1 (mobile), 2 or 3 (desktop). Each card uses 'glow_border' surface style.
card_anatomy: Image placeholder (use media urls) at the top, max-h-48 object-cover, wrapped in overflow-hidden.
Hover effect on image: scale up slightly.
Content: Title (Space Grotesk), Description, Tech Stack Pills (JetBrains Mono text-xs).

learning_and_certifications.design: Use react-fast-marquee for 'What I'm Learning' (Continuous scrolling text in JetBrains Mono, outlined text style). Certifications displayed as sleek horizontal glass tickets.

contact.design: Shadcn UI form customized with dark mode aesthetics. Inputs have bg-white/5, border-white/10, focus:border-cyan-400. Embedded inside a glassmorphism panel. Social links below the form.

testing.rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) must include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-projects', data-testid='contact-form-submit').
